mapper.select: SELECT 'legalManage' AS title ,'/LegalManage' AS route ,'legalManageDesc' AS description , case when legalManage.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_legal_manage A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.confirmed_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS legalManage union all SELECT 'legalReview' AS title ,'/LegalReview' AS route ,'legalReviewDesc' AS description , case when legalReview.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_legal_review A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS legalReview
